## Description
[Provide a clear and concise description of the changes introduced by this PR. Explain WHY this change is needed, not just WHAT was changed.]

## Related Issue
Resolves #[Insert Issue Number Here].

## Type of Change
Put x into the brackets to mark the selected type of change.
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Refactoring (code improvement, no functional changes)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)

## Pre-Review Checklist for Author
Before requesting a review, please ensure you have completed the following steps:
Put x into the brackets to mark the selected checklist item as completed.
- [ ] I have linked the corresponding Issue.
- [ ] I have performed a self-review or self-test of my own code.
- [ ] I have fetched the latest `develop` and rebased my branch (`git rebase origin/develop`).
- [ ] I have resolved all merge conflicts locally.
- [ ] My code successfully passes all local tests and build checks.
- [ ] I have list my teammate below to let them know.

## Reviewers
Please @ your teammate here to keep them updated on your progress.

## Reviewer Guidelines
- Verify that the PR branch is fully synced with `develop` (no complex merge commits).
- Verify that the CI actions have successfully completed.
- Ensure the "Squash and merge" option is used upon approval if merging into `develop`.
